## Problem

What problem does this solve? What workflow is awkward or missing today?

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives

Any alternative approaches or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional context

Mockups, example requests/responses, or links to relevant upstream docs.
